properties.titulo_evento: Anger grows in Venezuela as citizens blocked from aiding earthquake rescue
properties.descricao: Anger is mounting in Venezuela after the military barred citizens from entering zones devastated by the earthquakes.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran war live: Air raid sirens in Bahrain, Kuwait as US bombs Sirik, Qeshm
properties.descricao: US president threatens to 'militarily complete the job' as the US strikes Sirik and Qeshm Island over ship attacks.

properties.titulo_evento: US launches second night of strikes on Iran after ship hit by drone
properties.descricao: The attacks come after an alleged Iranian drone struck another commercial vessel in the Strait of Hormuz on Saturday.

properties.titulo_evento: Another powerful magnitude 4.8 earthquake hits near Venezuela
properties.descricao: The latest quake comes as rescuers are still searching for survivors of the twin 7.2 and 7.5 earthquakes on Wednesday.

properties.titulo_evento: Why is Crimea critical to the Russia–Ukraine war?
properties.descricao: Ukraine is intensifying attacks on Russian-controlled Crimea as Kyiv tries to pressure Moscow into ending the war.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel orders troops to prepare for ‘extended stay’ in Lebanon
properties.descricao: Israeli Defence Minister Israel Katz says the military has been ordered to prepare for an ‘extended stay’ in Lebanon.

properties.titulo_evento: Two killed, dozens injured in Israeli strike on displacement tents in Gaza
properties.descricao: Two killed and dozens injured in Israeli strike on displacement tents in Gaza

properties.titulo_evento: Brother and sister killed in Israeli attack on Gaza ‘safe zone’
properties.descricao: Israeli drones struck tents in al-Mawasi, killing two Palestinians and wounding several others.

properties.titulo_evento: Hezbollah rejects Israel-Lebanon agreement as Israeli attacks hit south
properties.descricao: Israeli strike kills one in southern Lebanon as many view latest agreement with Israel as a 'surrender of sovereignty'.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela earthquakes kill 920 people as international rescue teams arrive
properties.descricao: Hundreds are still feared trapped under the rubble, as families desperate for news.

properties.titulo_evento: 'Every person saved is a miracle': Families call to trapped loved ones in region devastated by Venezuela quakes
properties.descricao: Families keep vigil at buildings where they fear their loved ones are trapped, but face an impossible task to move heavy debris.

properties.titulo_evento: Israel strikes southern Lebanon as Hezbollah condemns new deal
properties.descricao: Strikes have killed at least one person, state media say a day after Lebanon and Israel signed a framework agreement.

properties.titulo_evento: US strikes Iran after attack on cargo ship
properties.descricao: Iran accuses the US of violating their deal and says it struck targets linked to American forces in response.

properties.titulo_evento: Meloni and Trump: A very public fall-out that is proving very hard to fix
properties.descricao: Italy's PM was not long ago being called the "Trump whisperer", but their relationship has gone from public attacks to personal insults.

properties.titulo_evento: Mother dies saving daughter in Venezuela earthquakes
properties.descricao: Héctor Bello wrote on social media that "you gave your own life for our daughter" in the quakes which killed at least 920 people.

properties.titulo_evento: In Caracas, this feels like the hardest moment in Venezuela's modern history
properties.descricao: Rescue teams are working ceaselessly to reach those trapped under rubble. But as hope fades, anger is growing.

properties.titulo_evento: They quit the West for Russia's traditional values, but it wasn't what they expected
properties.descricao: The BBC asks Westerners who moved to Russia if life there lives up to expectations.

properties.titulo_evento: Could you handle a 20-plus hour flight? This airline is banking on it
properties.descricao: Some analysts say the first non-stop London to Sydney flight is a major milestone - but would you buy a ticket?

properties.titulo_evento: Just how much trouble is Canada's economy in?
properties.descricao: Five charts help illustrate the state of Canada's economy - and how it's performing compared to other wealthy nations.

properties.titulo_evento: Panic attacks and fractures - Venezuela hospital treats earthquake victims
properties.descricao: The BBC travelled to a Caracas hospital that is treating people from the worst affected areas.

properties.titulo_evento: Watch: A race against the clock for Venezuela earthquake rescuers
properties.descricao: There is a sense that the next few hours will be critical for saving anyone who is still trapped, says the BBC's Dan Johnson reporting from the border of Venezuela and Columbia.

properties.titulo_evento: Newborn baby rescued from Venezuela earthquake rubble
properties.descricao: Two powerful earthquakes rocked Venezuela within seconds of each other on Wednesday, killing at least 920 people.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran, US trade attacks in the Strait of Hormuz: Navigating the 'Guardian Angel' route
properties.descricao: Shots have been fired in the Strait of Hormuz. The is a diplomatic and logistical condundrum of what to do next. A literal rock and a hard place, where 11,000 crew remain stuck on ships in the middle of two warring belligerents now negotiating peace...

properties.titulo_evento: Understanding the 'point men': Iran-US peace talks
properties.descricao:
Following the latest round of US-Iran peace talks, we assess the difficulties of diplomacy and the key characters at play. 
 
France 24's Gavin Lee spoke to Marvi Memon who served as a federal minister in the Pakistani govenrment from 2015 to 2018. ...

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela earthquakes: Nearly 7 million may be impacted — UN
properties.descricao: The projection includes up to two million people in the capital, Caracas. Rescue teams are racing against time to save survivors, three days after the twin quakes that killed 1,430 people. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine strikes Russian weapons plant, Moscow fuel hub
properties.descricao: The two attacks, in Volgograd and Vladimir regions, are part of President Zelenskyy's strategy to bring the war to the Russian people and force Putin into peace negotiations.

properties.titulo_evento: Why is the US targeting Germany's drug industry?
properties.descricao: A new trade probe is reigniting a long-running clash over who should pay for medical innovation. Washington argues Germans benefit from lower prices while US patients shoulder a disproportionate share of the costs.

properties.titulo_evento: Rome celebrates 80 years of Italy's iconic Vespa scooter
properties.descricao: Thousands of Vespa riders took to Rome's streets to mark Vespa's 80th birthday. The wasp-waisted scooter became a symbol of Italy's rebirth after World War II.

properties.titulo_evento: Why is Germany taking a big stake in a major tankmaker?
properties.descricao: The German government will buy a 40% stake in tankmaker KNDS. The deal is as much about control in the critical defense sector as it is about the Franco-German relationship.

properties.titulo_evento: Why Germany's Deutsche Bahn will face delays for many years
properties.descricao: Delayed, unreliable and forced into long detours due to construction: Germany no longer sets the pace when it comes to rail travel — and this is unlikely to change anytime soon. The company is mired in a deep crisis.

properties.titulo_evento: Military-age Ukrainian men could lose EU protection
properties.descricao: The European Commission has suggested withdrawing protection status for military-age Ukrainian males. A number of EU countries support the move — and so does Kyiv.

properties.titulo_evento: US carries out 'additional strikes' on Iran
properties.descricao: The US military said "additional strikes" have been carried out on targets in Iran. CENTCOM said the strikes were in response to a drone strike on a tanker in the Strait of Hormuz. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukrainian missiles strike defense plant deep in Russia, Zelenskyy says
properties.descricao: Flamingo missiles struck the "Titan-Barricade" manufacturing site in Volgograd, Ukrainian president said.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran’s World Cup dream is still alive — on day that US launched new military strikes
properties.descricao: American assault on Iranian military installations preceded a critical tournament game that leaves Tehran’s soccer players on the brink of progressing.

properties.titulo_evento: US strikes Iran after ship attack
properties.descricao: The president said earlier Friday that the attack on ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz was a “foolish violation” of the ceasefire agreement.

properties.titulo_evento: In Strait of Hormuz, Renewed Strikes Threaten to Set Back Shipping Recovery
properties.descricao: The attacks came after traffic through the Strait of Hormuz had reached the highest levels since the start of the U.S. war in Iran.

properties.titulo_evento: Oil Prices Return to Prewar Levels After Four Months
properties.descricao: The cost of crude has become a real-time barometer of the Iran war’s toll on the global economy.

properties.titulo_evento: How a Jet Fuel Refinery Is Scrambling After the Iran War Oil Shock
properties.descricao: For a mega-refinery in Ulsan, South Korea, a top exporter of jet fuel to the West Coast of the United States and other places, weaning off Middle Eastern oil is no small feat.
